expectations.text: Produces an actual one-month content calendar (dated or weekly-structured posts), not just questions
Includes a concrete post idea/theme for each scheduled slot
expectations.evidence: Every slot has a specific idea (croissant Reel, 5am prep, regular spotlight, etc.).

expectations.text: Reflects a mix of content types or pillars rather than one repeated format
expectations.evidence: Four pillars with a stated mix; rotates product/BTS/community/promo.

expectations.text: States an assumption about audience or goal in one line
expectations.evidence: Opening assumptions line (local bakery, foot traffic, ~4x/week).

expectations.text: Does NOT withhold the calendar pending answers to clarifying questions
expectations.evidence: Delivers immediately; single optional follow-up at the end.
